name: Egg Shortbread
recipeIngredient: 6 tbsp White or light brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the butter well with the sugar until combined.
2. Add the egg and mix thoroughly.
3. Fold in the flour and salt by hand until just incorporated.
4. Pat the dough evenly on a baking sheet, cover with foil, and place dried beans or rice over the surface.
5. Bake at 400°F for about 10 minutes, then reduce to 350°F and bake an additional 10 minutes.
6. Remove the foil and beans, lower the temperature to 325°F, and bake another 10 minutes until set but not browned.
7. Allow to cool slightly, then cut into approximately 40 thin rectangles.
